name: com.aptoslabs.explorer
title: Aptos Explorer
description: Official Aptos blockchain explorer with read-only WebMCP navigation tools for opening transactions, accounts, blocks, releases, coins, and search results.

transport.description: Open the explorer in a browser that supports navigator.modelContext. The page registers the tools listed in this card as read-only WebMCP navigation tools.

remotes.name: aptos-explorer-webmcp
remotes.title: Aptos Explorer WebMCP
remotes.description: Client-side WebMCP tools registered on explorer.aptoslabs.com for read-only Aptos Explorer navigation.

tools.name: search_explorer
tools.title: Search Aptos Explorer
tools.description: Route the explorer home-page search to an on-chain entity. Supports addresses, transaction versions or hashes, ANS .apt names, coin types, and block heights.

tools.name: open_transaction
tools.title: Open transaction
tools.description: Open the Aptos Explorer transaction page for a version number or transaction hash, with an optional detail tab.

tools.name: open_account
tools.title: Open account
tools.description: Open the Aptos Explorer account page for a 0x-prefixed address or ANS .apt name, with an optional account tab.

tools.name: open_block
tools.title: Open block
tools.description: Open the Aptos Explorer block page for a block height.

tools.name: open_releases
tools.title: Open releases hub
tools.description: Open the releases hub for network deployment status, AIPs, or SDK and tool releases.

tools.name: open_coin
tools.title: Open coin
tools.description: Open the Aptos Explorer coin page for a fully-qualified Move coin type.

_meta.specification: SEP-1649 / SEP-2127 draft MCP Server Cards
